summary: Backend testing for code quality refactoring - handleControllerError utility, unused exports removal, and TypeScript error fixes. All 23 tests passed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All controller refactoring tests pass. TypeScript compilation is clean after fixing spread type issue on line 233 of apiController.ts (changed `companyData.dataValues` to `companyData as Record<string, unknown>` since validateCompanyOwnership already returns dataValues directly). Updated diagnostic tests to check actual existing endpoints (email-preview, binance-ping) instead of non-existent endpoints (volatility, fee-rates).

typescript_error_fixed.issue: TS2698: Spread types may only be created from object types
typescript_error_fixed.root_cause: validateCompanyOwnership returns company.dataValues directly, not the company object. Code was spreading companyData.dataValues when companyData already WAS dataValues

test_update.issue: Tests were checking non-existent endpoints (/diagnostics/volatility and /diagnostics/fee-rates)
test_update.fix: Updated to test actual existing endpoints (/diagnostics/email-preview and /diagnostics/binance-ping)
